message:
test(oracle): add 8 conformance test suites (399 total)

New suites: trigger UPDATE OLD/NEW, recursive CTE fibonacci/series,
mixed aggregate/non-aggregate, multi-column ORDER BY with NULLs,
UPSERT ON CONFLICT, ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN, last_insert_rowid(),
changes() function.

Known gap found: bare columns with MAX/MIN take from extremum row
in C SQLite but first-row-in-group in FrankenSQLite (documented).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
